allies.rationale_text: Decomposition strengthens chain-of-thought by forcing the problem into smaller linked units before any final answer is trusted.
allies.source_quote: decomposition of a complex problem into a sequence of smaller, logically connected steps

allies.rationale_text: Step-back prevents chain-of-thought from getting lost in local detail by reconnecting the reasoning to the big picture.

antagonists.rationale_text: Anchoring can corrupt chain-of-thought when the first plausible answer determines the later steps instead of being tested by them.
antagonists.source_quote: the tendency to jump to conclusions before the chain is tested

structured_tensions.tension_text: Chain-of-thought conflicts with lateral-thinking when sequential step-by-step decomposition suppresses non-linear leaps that would reach a better solution faster.
structured_tensions.source_quote: chain-of-thought conflicts with lateral-thinking (lateral thinking) when sequential step-by-step decomposition suppresses non-linear leaps that would reach a better solution faster.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Chain-of-thought conflicts with simplification when an elaborate reasoning chain adds legibility at the cost of obscuring the one or two variables that actually drive the outcome.
structured_tensions.source_quote: chain-of-thought conflicts with simplification (simplification) when an elaborate reasoning chain adds legibility at the cost of obscuring the one or two variables that actually drive the outcome.

curation_notes.summary: Relation surface stays inside the current graph vocabulary and keeps omission stronger than weak forcing.
donor_drops: Did not widen Wave 3 target ids or import donor-shaped relation neighborhoods to rescue weak local grounding.
open_questions: Some source-real neighbors remain omitted because the current graph vocabulary would force weaker mappings than this conservative pass allows.

allies: Wave 4 candidacy remains observational only and is noted only in batch artifacts.
antagonists: No multihop or higher-order semantics were introduced in these Wave 3 files.
structured_tensions: Explicit tensions were preserved only where the raw source clearly earned a current-vocabulary target.
